## Scope guard

- [ ] Implementation protected paths are unchanged after the implementation merge.
- [ ] Formal run was executed only after the implementation PR merged to `main`.
- [ ] This PR does not modify implementation, config, schema, or formal statistical definitions.
- [ ] Only the next unstarted formal experiment after GOV-T02 activation is in scope.
